name: Italian Cheese Terrine
recipeInstructions:
1. Place one slice of cheese on a large piece of plastic wrap.
2. Spread one teaspoon of pesto over the cheese.
3. Top with three slices of salami (do not stack).
4. Brush salami lightly with salad dressing.
5. Repeat layers, using all ingredients, and end with cheese.
6. Surround the stack with sprigs of thyme if desired.
7. Fold plastic wrap over layers, sealing securely.
8. Place a heavy object, such as a small cast iron skillet, on top of terrine.
9. Cover and chill at least 24 hours or up to 3 days.
Remove plastic wrap to serve terrine. Cut into wedges using an electric or sharp knife. Serve with breadsticks and marinara sauce.
